text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant... Is everyone havingfun?!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
C'mon, let's make a little noise—you<n>don't have
to yell. Ready?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Tachyon, I really don't think concerts<n>are for me...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Why don't you save those words for<n>later? It's
too soon to draw<n>conclusions.

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
(...There are still a decent number of<n>people here,
but some are already<n>leaving.)

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
(Letting the concert drag on won't<n>help get any
more people on board<n>with the Grand Concert. We
should<n>wrap it up and start explaining our—)

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I CAAAN'T HEAR YOUUU! C'mon,<n>everyone,
louder! On three!

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text: (Falcon's still at it, though...)

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Again!

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text: This... THIS IS SO MUCH FUN!

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text: We want to hear more!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Roger that! Let's turn up the fun!

text_block_list.name: Onlooker A
text_block_list.text:
Hey, wanna check out the concert<n>over there for a
bit?

text_block_list.name: Onlooker B
text_block_list.text: ...Sure, why not? Looks kinda fun.

text_block_list.name: Onlooker C
text_block_list.text: Hmm-hm-hmm... ♪

text_block_list.name: Onlooker D
text_block_list.text:
Humming along now, are we? You're<n>getting
pretty into it.

text_block_list.name: Onlooker C
text_block_list.text: S-so what? It's kinda catchy...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Yeah, that's it! Let's all sing together!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
That's what this concert's for! We<n>want you all to
sing with us!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Heh-heh... And now for the reaction.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The spectators look to the stage<n>again, this time
with new eyes.
